closeout.not_promoted: the sub-bit REPRESENTATION (Gravity-NEGATIVE, catastrophic capability regression next-token 0.36) - blocks representation promotion, NOT execution grammar; Frontier keeps searching for a quality-positive representation
closeout.promoted: m2_shared_lookup_linear execution grammar - VERIFIED parity-preserving A/B/C/D (exact end-to-end), reduces logical FLOPs/movement/dispatches; integrated as AVAILABLE provider with Gen-F direct-compact as wall-safe default
closeout.promotion_decision: OUTCOME A for the EXECUTION GRAMMAR / representation NOT promoted
closeout.wall_speed_claim: NONE - timing contaminated (MoP) + equivocal; promoted on parity + logical-work-reduction grounds, not a wall-clock win (avoids the microbenchmark/contaminated-timing forbidden exit)

fallback: B0 source-native direct-compact (Generation F path) - always admissible
integration_note: champions are quality-NEUTRAL mechanical improvements ready to apply to the Frontier execution path when a quality-POSITIVE representation is found; NOT merged to main without approval (house rule). Wired via mech_run_all.py run-all feedback loop.
measurement_confidence: timing MEASURED+contaminated(MoP); mech vector ANALYTICAL/MEASURED labelled; energy UNAVAILABLE
mechanical_results: M1 lookup-linear 2.5-3.3x faster CPU vs compact @ zero quality cost; M2 shared-table reuse; M4 fused launch/temp; M6 richer-codebook mlp1 win; M5 conditional-Doctor NEGATIVE (gate never fires at deep sub-bit)
quality_results: NEGATIVE at sub-bit (rel_err 0.65-0.88 mlp1 / 0.20-0.36 mlp2); mechanical wins are quality-NEUTRAL vs their representation; NO capability pass, NO Event Horizon
tests: mech_measure 13 + mech_run_all 13 = 26 green; frozen suites unchanged

winning_operator_per_tensor_class.base_mechanical_win: M2 shared_lookup_linear_moe (75% table-builds avoided, 64-69% fewer FLOPs, 3-7% faster) - applies across MoE regardless of class
